item.title: Coyote Bronco Gets a New Coat of Paint
item.description: A Coyote-powered Bronco gets a fresh coat of paint, giving the build a renewed look and bringing it one step closer to completion. How much can new paint change the entire project?

media:content.media:title: Coyote Bronco Gets a New Coat of Paint
media:content.media:description: A Coyote-powered Bronco gets a fresh coat of paint, giving the build a renewed look and bringing it one step closer to completion. How much can new paint change the entire project?

item.title: Bringing Home a Forgotten Giant: The Lowboy Trailer
item.description: A look at bringing home a forgotten lowboy trailer and the work involved in getting it back into the garage. What would you inspect first?

media:content.media:title: Bringing Home a Forgotten Giant: The Lowboy Trailer
media:content.media:description: A look at bringing home a forgotten lowboy trailer and the work involved in getting it back into the garage. What would you inspect first?

item.title: 5.0 Boss 302 Mustang Burnout Test
item.description: 5.0 Boss 302 in a Mustang during a burnout test, showing the engine and car setup in action. A straightforward look at the build and mechanical work behind the scene. What do you think of this setup?

media:content.media:title: 5.0 Boss 302 Mustang Burnout Test
media:content.media:description: 5.0 Boss 302 in a Mustang during a burnout test, showing the engine and car setup in action. A straightforward look at the build and mechanical work behind the scene. What do you think of this setup?

item.title: Rare '61 McCulloch Boat Found in Shed
item.description: A rare 1961 McCulloch boat is pulled from a shed and inspected as part of a hands-on restoration and mechanical project. What condition is it in, and what work will it need?

media:content.media:title: Rare '61 McCulloch Boat Found in Shed
media:content.media:description: A rare 1961 McCulloch boat is pulled from a shed and inspected as part of a hands-on restoration and mechanical project. What condition is it in, and what work will it need?

item.title: Abandoned Boom Lift: Frozen Time Capsule
item.description: An abandoned boom lift sits untouched, showing the wear, components, and condition left behind over time. A closer look at the machine’s structure and mechanical details. What would you inspect first?

media:content.media:title: Abandoned Boom Lift: Frozen Time Capsule
media:content.media:description: An abandoned boom lift sits untouched, showing the wear, components, and condition left behind over time. A closer look at the machine’s structure and mechanical details. What would you inspect first?

item.title: Diesel Experiment: Old Fuel vs. Powerful Engine
item.description: A diesel experiment comparing old fuel with a powerful engine. The video focuses on the setup and mechanical behavior during the test. What changes show up in the build?

media:content.media:title: Diesel Experiment: Old Fuel vs. Powerful Engine
media:content.media:description: A diesel experiment comparing old fuel with a powerful engine. The video focuses on the setup and mechanical behavior during the test. What changes show up in the build?

item.title: Our Ford’s Front Tank Hitch - How We Fixed It
item.description: We walk through how the front tank hitch on our Ford was fixed, focusing on the repair process and the mechanical work involved. A straightforward look at the modification and how it came together.

media:content.media:title: Our Ford’s Front Tank Hitch - How We Fixed It
media:content.media:description: We walk through how the front tank hitch on our Ford was fixed, focusing on the repair process and the mechanical work involved. A straightforward look at the modification and how it came together.

item.title: K100 Hauling Shermanator
item.description: The K100 is hauling the Shermanator in this garage build update. A straightforward look at the truck and project car setup in motion. What would you like to see next?

media:content.media:title: K100 Hauling Shermanator
media:content.media:description: The K100 is hauling the Shermanator in this garage build update. A straightforward look at the truck and project car setup in motion. What would you like to see next?

item.title: What Replaced Plasma Tables?
item.description: A look at what has taken the place of plasma tables in the shop, with a focus on the tools and workflow behind the change. What’s driving the switch?

media:content.media:title: What Replaced Plasma Tables?
media:content.media:description: A look at what has taken the place of plasma tables in the shop, with a focus on the tools and workflow behind the change. What’s driving the switch?

item.title: Road Trip Nightmare: Stranded 4000 Miles Away
item.description: A road trip takes an unexpected turn when a breakdown or major issue leaves the journey stranded far from home. How did things go so wrong so far away?

media:content.media:title: Road Trip Nightmare: Stranded 4000 Miles Away
media:content.media:description: A road trip takes an unexpected turn when a breakdown or major issue leaves the journey stranded far from home. How did things go so wrong so far away?

item.title: Powerful 16-Cylinder Detroit Diesel Roars
item.description: A look at a powerful 16-cylinder Detroit Diesel in action, highlighting the sound and mechanical presence of a large diesel engine. What stands out most about this build?

media:content.media:title: Powerful 16-Cylinder Detroit Diesel Roars
media:content.media:description: A look at a powerful 16-cylinder Detroit Diesel in action, highlighting the sound and mechanical presence of a large diesel engine. What stands out most about this build?
